title: Ask HN: Why is the HN crowd so anti-AI?
content: Genuine question. Over the past six months, there hasn’t been a single day where I’ve checked the HN Best RSS feed without seeing a post about how AI “writes bad code,” “introduces bugs,” “creates technical debt,” or something along those lines. I’ll probably make a lot of enemies by saying this, but do people realize that code is just a means to an end? Users don’t care whether the code was written by AI or by hand, or which framework you used. They care that the product works. I say this as someone who has spent more than 20 years honing their craft as a software engineer. Let’s face it: by the time I manually ship version 1.0 of a product, the AI-assisted version could have been deployed 10x faster. By then, enough real-world feedback would have surfaced to identify the major issues, and tools like Claude Code would make it possible to fix and ship version 2.0 at an incredible pace. At some point, execution speed starts to matter more than the elegance of the code. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48420827 Points: 416 # Comments: 681
summary: 用户质疑Hacker News社区对AI的普遍反感态度，认为代码只是实现目的的手段，用户更关心产品功能而非代码来源。作者以20年软件工程师经验指出，AI辅助开发能大幅提升迭代速度，快速获取用户反馈并改进产品，强调执行速度比代码优雅更重要。
highlights: Users don’t care whether the code was written by AI or by hand, or which framework you used. They care that the product works.
By the time I manually ship version 1.0 of a product, the AI-assisted version could have been deployed 10x faster.
At some point, execution speed starts to matter more than the elegance of the code.

title: If LLMs Have Human-Like Attributes, Then So Does Age of Empires II
summary: 文章探讨如果大语言模型具有类人属性，那么《帝国时代II》也应被视为具有类人属性，通过类比游戏AI与LLM的相似性来质疑当前对AI类人属性的定义。
highlights: If LLMs Have Human-Like Attributes, Then So Does Age of Empires II
通过类比游戏AI与LLM的相似性来质疑当前对AI类人属性的定义

title: Her · हेर — a detective for your Claude Code sessions
summary: Her (हेर) 是一个为 Claude Code 会话设计的侦探式调试工具，通过分析会话日志帮助开发者快速定位问题根源，提升调试效率。
highlights: Her acts as a detective for your Claude Code sessions, analyzing logs to pinpoint issues.
Designed to streamline debugging by providing insights into session behavior.
Built as part of a small hackathon project, showcasing practical AI integration.

title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI
summary: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety 是 NVIDIA 推出的可定制多模态安全模型，旨在为全球企业AI提供灵活的内容安全解决方案，支持文本、图像等多种输入形式的安全检测与过滤。
highlights: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety 支持多模态输入，包括文本和图像。
该模型专为全球企业AI设计，提供可定制的内容安全策略。
NVIDIA 强调其灵活性和适应性，以满足不同企业的安全需求。
